mission.title: strimzi: Allow manual rolling updates of Connect and MM2 clusters
mission.description: The `StableConnectIdentities` feature gate moved all Connect and MM2 clusters to Strim

resolution.summary:
### Type of change

- Documentation

### Description

This PR does the documentation for the PR #9153 / Issue #9142. It extends the existing docs for the manual rolling updates with mentions of Connect and MM2. It uses separate PR for the docs for easier review.

### Checklist

- [x] Update documentation
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
